{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323145816AE8A7B05AAB02AE98B57\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353421636945003279","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的内容好全面呀！它对中国动漫游戏产业的各个领域都进行了深入分析，结构清晰，让我对这个行业有了更深入的了解。而且写作风格很务实，文笔简洁明了，我特别喜欢里面的案例分析，很有启发性。推荐给对动漫游戏感兴趣的朋友们！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708575244,"group_id":"7231483820438981664","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N35UZqbgR4Ff8/Qnv820QcOSsrqPKkCyLPXZgUmvIQrv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3635458034635305","user_name":"爱吃辣白菜饼的姜载桐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3635458034635305","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7231483820438981664","book_info":{"abstract":"本书在结构上分为：主报告、分报告、专题报告、区域报告、案例分析和附录6个部分。分别对动漫图书、电视动画、动画电影、动漫游戏类玩具、移动游戏行业、电竞行业等领域进行了全面梳理和深入分析，对行业的发展趋势进行了预测。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8a04b67db8af232df7244ef7886a3bec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"魏玉山","author_id":"","book_id":"7231483820438981664","book_name":"2016年中国动漫游戏产业年度报告","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#004090","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"27人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":405,\"name\":\"人文社科\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=405\u0026name=人文社科\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":50,\"
